register_sign_up_page.title: Welcome to 8th Wall
register_sign_up_page.tos_description: To continue you must agree to 8th Wall Terms of Services and acknowledge the Privacy Policy. You may choose to receive 8th Wall monthly newsletter via email for the latest news and updates.
register_sign_up_page.meta.title: Sign Up for Web AR
register_sign_up_page.meta.description: Create, collaborate and publish interactive augmented reality content to the web in real time with 8th Wall. Start developing now with a 14-day free trial.
register_sign_up_page.register_form.tos: I agree to the <1>Terms and Services</1> and the <3>Privacy Policy</3> <5>*</5>
register_sign_up_page.register_form.chec: I would like to receive news and updates about 8th Wall
register_sign_up_page.register_form.inpu: What primary industry do you build AR or VR for?
register_sign_up_page.register_sign_up_q: “Studio is a game-changer for our team as we build immersive WebAR and 3D experiences. We can jump into projects at any stage of production, get instant visual feedback, and collaborate seamlessly. The barrier to entry is much lower, which allows us to rapidly iterate and bring our creative visions to life faster than ever before.”
